{{Quote|I still do not understand why all vessels and vehicles, even troops, under my authority have to display this ridiculous-looking star badge.|Governor Dekeet during the Pentastar Talks|<ref name="PA" />}}
'''Ib Dekeet''' was a [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and [[Pentastar Alignment]] [[Governor/Legends|governor]] who was stationed in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].

==Biography==
Dekeet was one of the five powerful representatives present at the [[Pentastar Talks]], and was initially hesitant to join forces with [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] [[Ardus Kaine]]. However, the Grand Moff's skills as an orator and negotiator won the governor over. In particular, Governor Dekeet objected to putting the [[Pentastar Alignment]] logo on vehicles and troops under their command. Ardus Kaine pushed back on this by pointing out that the badge would strike fear and command respect within the heart of the Alignment's enemies.
[[File:Pentastar_Alignment.svg|thumb|Governor Dekeet wasn't fond of the Pentastar Alignment's emblem.]]
